text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One afternoon, as I'm heading out of the school building, I come
upon a somber-looking Fuji Kiseki gazing out the window.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe, what sweet kids, practicing so hard.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Just the grounds. The little ones are staying after school for extra
training.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Each one of them is speeding off with big, bright eyes, their paths
aimed straight toward their dreams.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Their dreams as racers...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I want to run to make others happy, but I don't know... Something
inside me is saying that alone is not quite enough.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I fear it will take more than that to become Fuji Kiseki, the greatest
entertainer.
choice_data_list: Is there anything I can do to help?
Is there anything I can do to help?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Good gracious! My feelings just come right out when I'm around you,
don't they? Actually, let me take you up on that—there's somewhere I
want to go.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Shall we make it a date, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm happy to accompany Fuji Kiseki for the night. Our destination is...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: This is our destination for tonight. Behold, the Okan Classic Hotel.
choice_data_list:
Wait, this is, like, one of the fanciest hotels in
Japan!

Wait, this is, like, one of the fanciest hotels in
Japan!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Perfect for a date, wouldn't you say?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...I joke. You see, this hotel holds within it a theater!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And today there's an important play. My dear friend—no, my former
rival—is about to make her stage debut.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
We've been friends since our children's theater days. It would always
be me and her competing for the lead role.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
When she chuckled, the audience laughed. When she cried, the
audience sobbed. She's truly an outstanding talent.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: However, that's not the only thing that made her fearsome...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
She did, very much so. All that remarkable ability, and she was never
satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But I don't believe I've ever lost in my desire to bring happiness to
others. Still, there was a decided difference between us.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: And on tonight's stage, I mean to ascertain exactly what that was.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the curtains rise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The young woman's performance is a sight to behold. She shines
bright, never ceasing to captivate the audience.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her every gaze and gesture radiates tremendous passion. She is
without a doubt the star of the show.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"Eclipse, incomparable goddess, I beg you smile upon me. Now, with
my dream in pieces, I need the strength to stand again."

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"Should my one wish to win this fight be granted, I would pledge my
undying soul to you. Place the everlasting crown upon my head!"

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: A great play indeed.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Her spellbinding performance left me in awe. Whether whispered or
shouted forth, I felt each word plunge right into me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
In the moment, I didn't realize what was making my body tremble so
hard.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But now I know. It's passion—a passion for acting—that drives one to
become their ideal self.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's also the enthusiasm to be the best. The unbreakable feeling,
bordering on obsession, to follow one's dreams.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: That's the kind of star performer who held me transfixed.
choice_data_list: Have you found what you've been looking for?
Have you found what you've been looking for?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I saw what lies beyond...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: The dream that lies beyond making others happy.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That was a tour de force I'll never forget. Congratulations on your
debut as a lead performer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Childhood Friend
text_block_list.text:
Fuji! You came to watch me?! This is great—I wanted you, more than
anyone, to be here.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I was so amazed, that I'm still spinning. It pains me to say it, but tonight, you were the greatest entertainer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That doesn't mean I admit defeat, though. One day I'm going to
surpass you and give everyone an enchanting show they'll never
forget!

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Childhood Friend
text_block_list.text:
And I'm going to climb to the top of the theater world. We may be on
different stages, but you're my rival, now and forever.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I'm honored. Then let us both pursue our dreams to their ends.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji shakes hands with her friend, who listens gleefully to those kind
words before departing with a wave.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's peculiar. My body feels hot, down to the core. I can't help wanting
to run right this instant.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: You know, Trainer, I'm really glad we got to see this play together.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I was actually scared at first—of having to stare right into the very
thing I still lack.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But with you there by my side, I was able to see what's past the point
of simply becoming the ideal me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I don't feel uncertain anymore, thanks to you. I'll never forget this
day.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Say, what's wrong? You got so quiet.
choice_data_list:
Nothing, I was just thinking how you look cooler
than ever.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh? What's this? Have you perchance become smitten with me? Well,
not that I would mind, of course!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
...Just joking! Let's get out of here before I get in trouble for breaking
curfew!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking at the time, I begin to panic, and we start sprinting toward
the train station.
